problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: If Photonic bandgap manipulation in metamaterial is applied to prevented, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
